# Original-text manifest for `/polish`

The papers below are the **original full texts** that must be read before each Nature Reviews-style generation pass.

Full texts are bundled under `../reference/` for portability. If the local autor library is available, the `data/papers/` path may also be used, but the `reference/` copy is the canonical portable source.

## Exemplar 1

- **Title:** *Deconvoluting the context-dependent role for autophagy in cancer*
- **Authors:** Eileen White
- **Journal / Year:** *Nature Reviews Cancer*, 2012
- **DOI:** `10.1038/nrc3262`
- **OpenAlex citations:** `1699`
- **Portable full text:** `../reference/White-2012.md`
- **Library full text:** `../../../../data/papers/White-2012-Deconvoluting-the-context-dependent-role-for-autophagy-in-cancer/paper.md`
- **Use as exemplar for:** single-author argumentative control, mechanistic adjudication, question-driven conclusions

## Exemplar 2

- **Title:** *AMPK: guardian of metabolism and mitochondrial homeostasis*
- **Authors:** Sébastien Herzig; Reuben J. Shaw
- **Journal / Year:** *Nature Reviews Molecular Cell Biology*, 2018
- **DOI:** `10.1038/nrm.2017.95`
- **OpenAlex citations:** `3801`
- **Portable full text:** `../reference/Herzig-2018.md`
- **Library full text:** `../../../../data/papers/Herzig-2018-AMPK-guardian-of-metabolism-and-mitochondrial-homeostasis/paper.md`
- **Use as exemplar for:** conceptual compression, large-field control, restrained evaluative phrasing

## Exemplar 3

- **Title:** *The cell biology of mitochondrial membrane dynamics*
- **Authors:** Marta Giacomello; Aswin Pyakurel; Christina Glytsou; Luca Scorrano
- **Journal / Year:** *Nature Reviews Molecular Cell Biology*, 2020
- **DOI:** `10.1038/s41580-020-0210-7`
- **OpenAlex citations:** `1468`
- **Portable full text:** `../reference/Giacomello-2020.md`
- **Library full text:** `../../../../data/papers/Giacomello-2020-The-cell-biology-of-mitochondrial-membrane-dynamics/paper.md`
- **Use as exemplar for:** explanation-first architecture, directional paragraph turns, disciplined handling of complex structure

## Exemplar 4

- **Title:** *Connecting copper and cancer: from transition metal signalling to metalloplasia*
- **Authors:** Eva J. Ge et al.
- **Journal / Year:** *Nature Reviews Cancer*, 2022
- **DOI:** `10.1038/s41568-021-00417-2`
- **OpenAlex citations:** `1210`
- **Portable full text:** `../reference/Ge-2022.md`
- **Library full text:** `../../../../data/papers/Ge-2022-Connecting-copper-and-cancer-from-transition-metal-signalling-to-metalloplasia/paper.md`
- **Use as exemplar for:** interdisciplinary synthesis, definitional discipline, translational framing without hype
